scripts.install:all: pip install -r backend/requirements.txt && npm install --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.build: npm install --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build --prefix frontend && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync('frontend/dist', 'dist', { recursive: true })"
